items.title: Security forces launch search operations in Manipur after two Assam Rifles personnel killed
items.summary: On July 10, Assam Rifles said the paramilitary force, in coordination with the Border Security Force and Manipur Police, commenced a large-scale search operation in the Nungshan...

items.title: England and Norway, Old Friends, Resurrect a Rivalry for the World Cup
items.summary: Along with historic and diplomatic ties, England’s club soccer teams have loyal fans in Norway. On Saturday, supporters will have to pick a side.

items.title: Spain battles to contain one of its deadliest wildfires as at least 12 killed
items.summary: At least four Britons are believed to be among the victims of the blaze, which left another 23 people missing.
